## Problem

What pain point are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your preferred solution.

## Alternatives Considered

What other options did you evaluate?

## Impact on MEG Model

- Does this change runtime authority boundaries?
- Does this require policy updates?
- Does this affect audit requirements?

## Additional Context

Links, examples, or references.
